mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_outbox ( id, event_id, event_type, topic, partition_key, payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, sent_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{topic}, #{partitionKey}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSON), #{statusCode}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{lastError}, #{createdAt}, #{sentAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE event_type = VALUES(event_type), topic = VALUES(topic), partition_key = VALUES(partition_key), payload = VALUES(payload), status = VALUES(status), retry_count = VALUES(retry_count), next_retry_at = VALUES(next_retry_at), last_error = VALUES(last_error), sent_at = VALUES(sent_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, event_type, topic, partition_key, CAST(payload AS CHAR) AS payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, sent_at, updated_at FROM t_outbox WHERE status IN (0, 3) AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE t_outbox SET status = #{statusCode}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, event_type, topic, partition_key, CAST(payload AS CHAR) AS payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, sent_at, updated_at FROM t_outbox WHERE id = #{id}
